title: uh optimization
description: uh optimization gives the best fps boosts without getting rid of the vanilla experience.
body:
**The uh optimization** Modpack is a no compromises, **pure performance** setup designed to massively boost FPS on both low end and high end systems. No matter what hardware you’re running, this pack will completely transform how Minecraft performs in the **best** way possible.

The difference is so dramatic that you’ll be genuinely surprised you ever played on base Minecraft before discovering this.

If you want extra features or quality of life mods, feel free to add them yourself. **I will never include unnecessary QoL mods this pack is focused strictly on performance** and staying as close to vanilla Minecraft as possible.

### **If there is any bugs please report them to me in the discord**
